title: When the Workflow Cannot Be Predrawn
topic: In the orchestrator-workers pattern, a central LLM dynamically identifies the subtasks required by the specific input, delegates them to workers, and synthesizes their results.
publishInstruction: For a retry after TikTok app review and Facebook channel reauthorization are fixed, use --reuse-video with this English videoPath instead of regenerating keyframes, audio, or video. Avoid reposting YouTube unless an intentional duplicate upload is desired.
